selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 6.3% and 20-day momentum is 11.0%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 8.1% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.6%, downside volatility near 0.9%, and a recent max drawdown of 2.7%.
Volume confirmation is 32.5% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 4.3% versus SPY over 5 days and 4.7% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.77, confidence 0.65, and 0.3 weighted articles across 3 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.77, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 4 articles across 3 sources, 0.3 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.98, average source quality 0.83, confidence 0.65.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.02).
Overall model score is 0.217 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: Barclays Says Honeywell (HON) Has Clear Catalysts as Spinoffs Near
news_evidence.llm_reason: Barclays raised its price target and reiterated Overweight, citing clear catalysts tied to upcoming spinoffs. Analyst upgrades and spinoff-related catalysts can drive stock moves in the next 1–10 trading days.

news_evidence.title: Honeywell International Inc. filed 8-K: 8-K
news_evidence.llm_reason: An SEC 8-K filing was submitted. 8-Ks can contain material disclosures that affect near-term trading, but the provided text lacks detail on the filing content, so impact is uncertain.
